path.style: animation: am-directive-color-kf-3-0-2 250.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 1200.000ms forwards, am-directive-pulse-kf-5-0 900.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 1600.000ms 1;
